tasks.context: Add comprehensive health check endpoint to backend/src/routes/health.ts that reports PM2 process status, Redis connectivity, database connection pool, and active task queue depth. Return 503 if any component fails. Include timestamp and version info.

In backend/src/utils/task-complexity-validator.ts, revert to safe complexity thresholds: maxFileChanges=3, maxContextChars=500, maxTestFiles=2. Add validation that rejects tasks exceeding these limits with clear error messages before queue submission.

Add dependency validation to backend/src/services/ledger/recorder.ts. Before marking task complete, verify all dependency IDs exist and are completed. Log warnings for missing deps. Store dependency graph in Redis with task_id:dependencies hash. Prevent execution if deps incomplete.

tasks.description: Add cascade failure detection to recorder
tasks.context: Extend backend/src/services/ledger/recorder.ts to detect when a task fails and auto-mark dependent tasks as blocked. Emit webhook event for cascade failures. Store blocked_reason field. Prevent silent skips by requiring explicit unblock action.

In backend/src/server.ts, add graceful degradation logic. If 3 consecutive task failures occur within 5 minutes, pause new task acceptance and send alert via backend/src/lib/logger.ts. Require manual resume via /admin/resume endpoint. Prevents cascade overwhelm.

Add GET /api/v1/tasks/:id/dependencies route to backend/src/routes/ledger.ts. Return full dependency tree with status for each node. Include blocked tasks and failure reasons. Use backend/src/services/ledger/query.ts for data retrieval. Enable debugging cascade failures.
